title: Charred Smoky Jamaican Hazelnuts Fritter
description: A festive and flavorful recipe featuring charred hazelnuts, a hint of cinnamon, and the warmness of allspice. Inspired by traditional Jamaican cuisine, this plant-based-friendly dish is perfect for snacking or as a side to your favorite meals.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, cinnamon, allspice, smoked paprika, and salt.
Add hazelnuts to the dry ingredients and stir to combine.
Gradually add vegan butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add vegetable oil and stir until the mixture is well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 8-10 patties.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and refrigerate for another 30 minutes.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Carefully flip the fritters and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Let the fritters cool slightly before serving.
